path: Problem: Flag rows based on a category value, with an additional condition that related rows in the same group meet a secondary criterion
Action: IF nested with COUNTIFS to test group-level existence of a secondary category

Observation: Use structured references (or consistent ranges) to count whether any row sharing the same keys (e.g., date + patient) contains the required companion category; only then flag the target category row
Problem: Ensure a newly added calculated column visually matches the formatting of an adjacent existing column
Action: Copy/Paste Special (Formats) or Format Painter; alternatively apply the same table column formatting style
Observation: In Excel Tables, formatting is typically consistent by default, but manual format copy ensures exact match when a new column is inserted or calculated
Resolution: Apply formatting from [ExistingColumn] to [NewColumn] via PasteSpecial(Formats) or Format Painter
